name: Malavika Gopi
feedback: It was a great program. I had the opportunity to learn new skills and gain valuable knowledge through excellent mentorship.

name: Angelina Mary George
college: School of Engineering, Cochin University of Science and Technology, Thrikkakkara
feedback: I started attending the internship sessions from 10th of this June and it has overall been a helpful experience for learning and making a good use of my time. The classes were understandable, not overly rushed, and while I had missed  the 1st classes from 1st to 10th of June the classes from 10th were mostly independent of the 1st ten days and so were easier to follow. Still, I might need some catching up to do on the topics taken on the 1st ten days. Hopefully, the rest of the days will go as smoothly as it went till now

name: Adarsh M R
college: Vidya Academy of Science and technology
feedback: I have been satisfied with the internship. I have learnt much about coding, front end and back end.

name: Christeena Jestin
feedback: I could learn a lot of new things,correct the mistakes I did earlier .

name: Angith Kishor K
college: Vidya Academy of Science and Technology
feedback: Great classes, nice pacing and got to learn new things other than theory

name: AMAN ZAHI
feedback:
Classes are short but good
Mentor always there for doubt clearance and any queries
Tasks were good and doable and helped us understand the architecture 
Learned something new

name: Mahad Mammu
college: Cochin University College of engineering kuttanad

name: Meera Surendran
feedback: Class was so good and understandable. Practical sessions were helpful

name: Mohammed Fezin
college: Vidya Academy of Science and Technology
feedback: It was really good experience. The duration is low but it it would've got boring if it was longer. The classes was interactive as well. The classes are taken with high clarity and the doubts are cleared at the classes as well as via whatsapp which was very helpful.

name: Aleena M Siju
college: Rajagiri School of Engineering and Technology
